title: selaginella quadrivenulosa
intro: Selaginella quadrivenulosa, also known as the quadrivenulose spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella quadrivenulosa include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and providing relief from fatigue. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
